message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>In absence of extensive testing for SARS-CoV-2, true prevalence of COVID-19 cases in India remain unknown. In this study, a conservative estimate of prevalence of COVID-19 is calculated based on the age wise COVID-19 positivity rate among patients with severe respiratory illness as reported by Indian Council of Medical Research. Calculations in the study estimates a cumulative number of 17151 COVID-19 positive cases by the end of April 2, 2020.</jats:p>
title: Estimate of COVID-19 case prevalence in India based on surveillance data of patients with severe acute respiratory illness
